title: medicago polymorpha var. brevispina
intro: Medicago polymorpha var. brevispina is a variant of the annual legume plant Medicago polymorpha, commonly known as burr clover or prickly medick, characterized by its short-spined leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its high fiber and saponin content. The health benefits of Medicago polymorpha var. brevispina are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
